metadata.description: Environment name used by Azure Developer CLI.
Primary Azure region for all resources in this deployment.
Administrator username for Azure Database for PostgreSQL.
Administrator password for Azure Database for PostgreSQL.
Application database name for the AlpaCore services.
Fallback image used when a service-specific image is not supplied yet.
Built OpenClaw image reference. Leave empty to provision with the fallback image until azd deploy pushes the real image.
Built Alphabet Harvester image reference. Leave empty to provision with the fallback image until azd deploy pushes the real image.
Image reference for the AlpaCore Engine workload.
Image reference for the supporting AlpaCore service workload.
Image reference for Open WebUI.
Cloud-reachable Ollama endpoint kept outside Azure Container Apps.
Shared-secret token for the OpenClaw gateway admin surface.
Secret key for Open WebUI sessions.
Optional OpenAI API key used by Open WebUI.
Shopify webhook secret used to validate direct HMAC deliveries into the Alphabet Harvester.
Stripe secret key written to Key Vault for the Alphabet Harvester runtime.
Optional Revolut client ID consumed by the AlpaCore Engine.
Optional Revolut client secret consumed by the AlpaCore Engine.
Optional Telegram bot token consumed by the AlpaCore Engine.
Timezone for the OpenClaw gateway container.
Disable Bonjour in containerized OpenClaw deployments unless a private network explicitly needs it.

variables.alpaEngineSecretDefinitions: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'postgres-admin-password', 'value', parameters('postgresAdminPassword'))), if(empty(parameters('revolutClientSecret')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'revolut-client-secret', 'value', parameters('revolutClientSecret')))), if(empty(parameters('telegramBotToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'telegram-bot-token', 'value', parameters('telegramBotToken')))))]
variables.openWebUiSecretDefinitions: [concat(if(empty(parameters('webUiSecretKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'webui-secret-key', 'value', parameters('webUiSecretKey')))), if(empty(parameters('openAiApiKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'openai-api-key', 'value', parameters('openAiApiKey')))))]
variables.openWebUiEnv: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'ENV', 'value', 'prod'), createObject('name', 'OLLAMA_HOST', 'value', parameters('externalOllamaUrl')), createObject('name', 'OLLAMA_BASE_URL', 'value', parameters('externalOllamaUrl')), createObject('name', 'USE_OLLAMA_DOCKER', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'SCARF_NO_ANALYTICS', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'DO_NOT_TRACK', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'ANONYMIZED_TELEMETRY', 'value', 'false')), if(empty(parameters('webUiSecretKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBUI_SECRET_KEY', 'secretRef', 'webui-secret-key'))), if(empty(parameters('openAiApiKey')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'OPENAI_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'openai-api-key'))))]

properties.value: [format('Host={0};Port=5432;Database={1};Username={2};Password={3};Ssl Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=false;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', variables('postgresServerName')), '2024-08-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('postgresDatabaseName'), parameters('postgresAdminLogin'), parameters('postgresAdminPassword'))]

containers.name: openclaw
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'TZ', 'value', parameters('openClawTimezone')), createObject('name', 'OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR', 'value', parameters('openClawDisableBonjour')), createObject('name', 'OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_BIND', 'value', 'lan'), createObject('name', 'OPENCLAW_PLUGIN_STAGE_DIR', 'value', '/var/lib/openclaw/plugin-runtime-deps'), createObject('name', 'OPENCLAW_CONTROL_UI_ALLOWED_ORIGINS', 'value', format('["https://{0}.{1}","http://{2}.{3}"]', variables('openClawContainerAppName'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', variables('managedEnvironmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain, variables('openClawContainerAppName'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', variables('managedEnvironmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain))), if(empty(parameters('openClawGatewayToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN', 'secretRef', 'openclaw-gateway-token'))))]

containers.name: harvester
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'NODE_ENV', 'value', 'production'), createObject('name', 'HARVESTER_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'HARVESTER_WORKERS', 'value', '15'), createObject('name', 'HARVESTER_PUBLIC_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}.{1}', variables('harvesterContainerAppName'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', variables('managedEnvironmentName')), '2024-03-01').defaultDomain)), createObject('name', 'HARVESTER_KEY_VAULT_URL', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').vaultUri), createObject('name', 'STRIPE_SECRET_KEY_SECRET_NAME', 'value', 'STRIPE-SECRET-KEY'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', variables('userAssignedIdentityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_HOST', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', variables('postgresServerName')), '2024-08-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_NAME', 'value', parameters('postgresDatabaseName')), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_USER', 'value', parameters('postgresAdminLogin')), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_PASSWORD', 'secretRef', 'postgres-admin-password'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_SSLMODE', 'value', 'require')), if(empty(parameters('shopifyApiSecret')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'SHOPIFY_API_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'shopify-api-secret'))))]

containers.name: alpa-engine
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT', 'value', 'Production'), createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_URLS', 'value', 'http://+:8080'), createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_HTTP_PORTS', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_HOST', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', variables('postgresServerName')), '2024-08-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_NAME', 'value', parameters('postgresDatabaseName')), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_USER', 'value', parameters('postgresAdminLogin')), createObject('name', 'DATABASE_PASSWORD', 'secretRef', 'postgres-admin-password'), createObject('name', 'OLLAMA_HOST', 'value', parameters('externalOllamaUrl')), createObject('name', 'HTTP_TIMEOUT', 'value', '60'), createObject('name', 'OLLAMA_TIMEOUT', 'value', '60000')), if(empty(parameters('revolutClientId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'REVOLUT_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('revolutClientId')))), if(empty(parameters('revolutClientSecret')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'REVOLUT_CLIENT_SECRET', 'secretRef', 'revolut-client-secret'))), if(empty(parameters('telegramBotToken')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN', 'secretRef', 'telegram-bot-token'))))]
